title: Season 18 applications launch
caption: Stars of Science opened applications for the 2026 season and invited Arab innovators to apply.
description: Application-focused launch creative with direct call to action and recruitment framing.
transcript: We are excited to launch our search for the next top Arab innovators. Apply now.
summary: Application launch reel with strong apply-now framing and season return energy.

title: Key facts about Stars of Science
caption: A fast explainer reel introduces Stars of Science to first-time viewers with key facts from the host.
description: Audience education and onboarding content for people new to the show.
transcript: First time hearing about Stars of Science? Here are the key facts you need to know.
summary: Short educational reel that explains the show's purpose and value quickly.

title: Season schedule promo
caption: A promotional reel tells viewers when to catch the latest season and reinforces the core promise of innovation turned into reality.
description: Tune-in promo with show positioning and timing reminder.
transcript: Catch the latest season every Friday and Saturday at 9 PM.
summary: Scheduling promo that works as concise brand positioning and reminder content.

title: Shada Bennbaia smart wristband feature
caption: Season 14 finalist Shada Bennbaia is featured with a wearable health innovation that tracks heart health and hydration.
description: Inventor spotlight anchored in product benefit and finalist credibility.
summary: Inventor success story focused on health tech and finalist credibility.

title: Season 18 is back
caption: Stars of Science is back for season 18 with venture-building language and bold recruitment framing.
description: Brand return announcement tied to age eligibility and venture-building positioning.
transcript: Season 18 goes beyond television. It is a full venture-building experience.
summary: Return announcement with strong ambition and application positioning.

title: Fast application hook
caption: A vertical short opens with the strongest prototype moment and then pivots into an apply-now invitation.
description: Short-form application creative adapted for swipe-first viewing.
transcript: Show the result first. Then tell innovators to apply now.
summary: High-retention recruitment video that leads with proof before CTA.

title: Prototype reveal clip
caption: A fast proof-driven clip shows an invention working before cutting to the inventor reaction.
description: Retention-first creative optimized for demos and reveal moments.
transcript: This is the moment the prototype works.
summary: Prototype reveal content with strong first-second retention.

title: Lab build behind the scenes
caption: A behind-the-scenes cut compresses build process, tools, and team energy into a short sequence.
description: Process-focused short content designed for maker culture and younger viewers.
transcript: How the build comes together in the lab.
summary: Process montage that rewards pace and workshop energy.

title: Host explains the show
caption: The host gives a snappy answer to what Stars of Science is and why Arab innovators should care.
description: Awareness creative for new audiences with fast pacing.
transcript: What is Stars of Science? It is where bold Arab ideas get built.
summary: Top-of-funnel explainer tailored to first-time platform viewers.

title: Finalist celebration cut
caption: A quick celebration clip packages the finalist story and the winning invention payoff into one vertical post.
description: Achievement-story creative with high emotional momentum.
summary: Achievement clip that balances emotional story and invention payoff.

title: Channel about Stars of Science
caption: The official channel frames Stars of Science as a platform built to inspire Arab innovation and creation.
description: Channel positioning copy for long-form audience expectation.
transcript: It all began in 2008. Qatar Foundation wanted to inspire an entire Arab generation to innovate and create.
summary: Brand positioning text that stresses mission, scale, and Arab innovation identity.

title: Season 16 episode 1
caption: Full episode content introduces contestants and builds long-form narrative around innovation challenges.
description: Episode-length viewing built for deeper explanation and story arcs.
transcript: Season 16 is here. Meet the brightest minds competing to turn ideas into reality.
summary: Long-form episode showing YouTube strength for sustained explanation and competition storytelling.

title: Season 17 episode 1
caption: The first episode of season 17 brings contestants into a full broadcast narrative for audiences willing to watch longer explainers.
description: Recent full-episode content with Arabic-first audience orientation.
transcript: Join us to watch the contestants face the judging panel.
summary: Recent full episode reinforcing YouTube for longer explainer and competition content.

title: Season 16 episode 5
caption: A semi-final episode extends the product and pitch narrative for higher-intent viewers.
description: Long-form competition content with explained judging and prototype evolution.
transcript: Watch the semi-final live here and follow the contestants through the next stage.
summary: Semi-final content showing YouTube strength for deeper competition arcs.

title: Season 17 episode 1 promo
caption: A shorter promo packages the hook of the episode into a quick teaser designed to convert viewers into full-episode watchers.
description: Promo asset sitting between short-form hype and long-form viewing.
summary: Teaser content that performs best when it points clearly to a deeper watch experience.

title: Company positioning on LinkedIn
caption: Stars of Science is presented as the premier innovation show in the Arab world and a Qatar Foundation initiative that empowers Arab innovators.
description: Professional positioning copy emphasizing impact and ecosystem value.
summary: Professional credibility framing suited to sponsors, institutions, and ecosystem partners.

title: Impact-driven innovation post
caption: A professional update highlights how contestant solutions benefit health, lifestyles, and the environment.
description: LinkedIn content centered on measurable value and societal outcomes.
summary: Impact-first professional update tailored to credibility and sponsor relevance.

title: Season 18 venture-building announcement
caption: The new season is framed as a venture-building experience, reinforcing professional seriousness and innovation pipeline value.
description: Recruitment copy adapted to professionals, mentors, and ecosystem supporters.
summary: Professional announcement that pairs recruitment with credibility and innovation-economy positioning.

title: Finalist spotlight for professional audience
caption: A finalist update focuses on problem solved, prototype maturity, and innovation impact instead of entertainment alone.
description: Inventor spotlight optimized for credibility and sponsor interest.
summary: Finalist spotlight built around impact, maturity, and professional proof.

title: Partner ecosystem recognition
caption: A professional post recognizes mentors, partners, and the ecosystem that supports innovation development.
description: Partnership- and sponsorship-adjacent content for institutional audiences.
summary: Ecosystem content that resonates with sponsors and professional supporters.

title: Season 18 launch thread
caption: A concise launch update invites Arab innovators to apply and uses a clear recruitment hook built for reposting.
description: Short text-led recruitment post with link-out behavior.
summary: Recruitment update with concise framing and conversation-ready CTA.

title: Live episode reminder
caption: A fast reminder post nudges viewers to tune in and shares the next competition milestone.
description: Timely update shaped for conversation and reminders.
summary: Timing-sensitive reminder content best suited to immediate conversation.

title: Finalist quote card
caption: A quote-led post lifts one sharp line from a finalist and links it to the invention outcome.
description: Conversation-friendly storytelling in a compact format.
summary: Compact story post suited to quote-driven conversation and shares.

title: Prototype explainer thread
caption: A short thread uses one hero image and a few precise lines to explain how a prototype works.
description: Threaded explanation for timely idea discussion.
summary: Compact explainer thread suited to timely conversation more than deep long-form learning.

title: Social media session
caption: The Stars of Science site hosts a social media session that packages communication and uploading tips for contestants.
description: Short-form education around platform behavior and sharing.
transcript: Communication tips, social media tips, interaction tips, and uploading tips are offered by the QF social media team.
summary: Educational content about how contestants should think about social sharing and communication.
